summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Coupon/Promotion System, Currency Selector, and Password Reset features. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features working correctly including currency selector, forgot password page, reset password page, admin coupons management, and booking page coupon integration.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/coupons requires authentication (401)
Backend: Admin can list coupons (200)
Backend: POST /api/coupons requires authentication (401)
Backend: Admin can create coupon with all fields
Backend: Duplicate coupon code rejected (400)
Backend: Admin can get coupon by ID
Backend: Admin can update coupon
Backend: Admin can disable (delete) coupon
Backend: POST /api/coupons/validate works without auth (fixed bug)
Backend: Invalid coupon code returns valid=false
Backend: Expired coupon (YILBASI20) rejected
Backend: Minimum order amount validation works
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password initiates reset (200)
Backend: Non-existent email returns 200 (security)
Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-reset-token with invalid token returns valid=false
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid token returns 400
Backend: Short password rejected (400/422)
Backend: GET /api/exchange-rates returns currency rates
Backend: Customer cannot list coupons (403)
Backend: Customer cannot create coupons (403)
Frontend: Currency selector visible in header with 6 currencies (TRY, EUR, USD, GBP, RUB, SAR)
Frontend: Currency can be changed (EUR selected successfully)
Frontend: Language selector visible in header (EN, TR, DE)
Frontend: Forgot Password page loads with form
Frontend: Forgot Password form has email input and submit button
Frontend: Reset Password page shows 'Geçersiz Link' for invalid token
Frontend: Admin Coupons page loads with table (10 coupons)
Frontend: Create Coupon dialog opens with all form fields
Frontend: Booking page has coupon input field
Frontend: METRO2026 coupon applies successfully (15% = ₺500 discount)
Frontend: Discount shown in booking summary (Subtotal ₺5,000 - Discount ₺500 = Total ₺4,500)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (Fixed coupon validation endpoint to work without authentication)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all coupon, currency, and password reset features working)

coupon_crud.notes: Admin-only access, hotel owners can manage their own coupons

coupon_validation.fix_applied: Changed from get_current_user_dict to get_optional_user to allow guest validation

seed_data_creation: Test coupons created during pytest: TEST_*, UPDATE_*, DELETE_*, MINAMT_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coupon validation endpoint was fixed to work without authentication (using get_optional_user instead of get_current_user_dict). All coupon CRUD operations require admin/hotel_owner role. Password reset flow works but email sending is mocked. Currency selector persists selection in localStorage.
